scope: Add a provisional benchmark proposal lane and evaluate whether ai-rfp-response-copilot should enter the maintained enterprise benchmark panel

decision_context.prior_state: The symmetric two-domain review recommended ai-rfp-response-copilot for first maintained benchmark admission, but that result still needed to be stress-tested on a broader enterprise panel before editing the maintained benchmark library.
decision_context.decision: Add a provisional benchmark lane to the hybrid spec, treat ai-rfp-response-copilot as a proposed benchmark member, keep ai-security-questionnaire-copilot as the first review challenger, and rerun a broader enterprise panel with secondary enterprise domains included.
decision_context.why_now: The repo needed a proposal path that does not mutate the maintained benchmark library before the broader enterprise validation is complete.

files_expected.purpose: Adds support for provisional benchmark members in hybrid specs.
Exposes the provisional benchmark lane through the hybrid spec CLI.
Documents how to draft a maintained benchmark proposal without editing the benchmark library.
Documents proposed benchmark members in the hybrid workflow.
Stores the broader enterprise proposal packet.
Stores the provisional benchmark proposal spec.
Stores the broader enterprise proposal run.
Summarizes whether the provisional benchmark proposal should become a real benchmark-library edit.
Captures the request and verification plan for this proposal tranche.

planned_steps: Add a provisional benchmark lane to the hybrid spec builder
Generate the broader enterprise proposal packet and spec
Run the broader enterprise proposal harness
Decide whether the maintained benchmark library edit should proceed or be deferred

expected_checks: The spec lists ai-rfp-response-copilot in proposed_benchmark_domain_ids
The spec lists ai-security-questionnaire-copilot in promotion_review_domain_ids
The final note states explicitly whether the maintained benchmark library should be edited

guardrails: Do not edit the maintained benchmark library in this tranche
Keep all output in exploratory_frontier until the proposal survives the broader panel
Record explicitly if the narrow recommendation fails to survive the broader enterprise run
